items.label: Provider Holdout

prechecks.label: Output eval cases
prechecks.next_action: Keep output holdout cases available before provider execution.

prechecks.label: Provider runner
prechecks.next_action: Use the provider runner instead of the local command runner for model-backed evidence.

prechecks.label: Provider credential
prechecks.next_action: Set OPENAI_API_KEY in the operator shell; never commit or print the value.

prechecks.label: Provider model
prechecks.next_action: Optionally set YAO_OUTPUT_EVAL_MODEL; the runbook defaults to gpt-4.1-mini.

source_checklist.label: Provider model run
source_checklist.next_action: Run provider-backed output-exec with real credentials.

source_checklist.label: Timing observed
source_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should record timing metadata.

source_checklist.label: Token usage observed
source_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should return non-estimated token usage.

items.next_action: Set OPENAI_API_KEY in the operator shell; never commit or print the value.

roles.label: Submission refs
roles.description: Rows marked submission-ref are the aggregate paths expected in artifact_refs.

roles.label: Supporting evidence
roles.description: Supporting-evidence rows help reviewers audit the packet but do not all need to be copied into artifact_refs.

runbook: Set OPENAI_API_KEY in the operator shell before running provider evidence; never commit or print the value.
Copy evidence/world_class/templates/provider-holdout.intake.json to evidence/world_class/submissions/provider-holdout.json and fill only real evidence fields.

repair_checklist.next_action: Set OPENAI_API_KEY in the operator shell; never commit or print the value.
repair_checklist.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

repair_checklist.next_action: Run provider-backed output-exec with real credentials.
repair_checklist.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py output-exec --provider-runner openai --timeout-seconds 60 && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

repair_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should return non-estimated token usage.
repair_checklist.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py output-exec --provider-runner openai --timeout-seconds 60 && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

items.label: Human Adjudication

prechecks.label: Blind review kit
prechecks.next_action: Open the blind review kit and record real reviewer choices with required rationale.

prechecks.label: Decision template
prechecks.next_action: Import real A/B decisions with reviewer, reviewed_at, winner_variant, confidence, reason, and truthful blind-review attestation via `python3 scripts/yao.py output-review-import --input <reviewer-decisions.json> --blind-review-attested --run-adjudication`.

prechecks.label: Decision importer
prechecks.next_action: Use the importer to reject raw content fields and normalize reviewer decisions before adjudication.

prechecks.label: Human reviewer
prechecks.next_action: Assign a real reviewer identity before claiming human adjudication.

source_checklist.label: Review pairs exist
source_checklist.next_action: Generate the blind A/B review pack.

source_checklist.label: No pending decisions
source_checklist.next_action: Record a reviewer choice and reason for every pair.

source_checklist.label: Judgments complete
source_checklist.next_action: Every pair needs one valid human judgment.

source_checklist.label: No invalid decisions
source_checklist.next_action: Fix malformed winner/confidence entries.

source_checklist.label: Reviewer metadata
source_checklist.next_action: Record reviewer and reviewed_at before adjudication can count.

source_checklist.label: Reason required
source_checklist.next_action: Keep reason mandatory for every imported or direct reviewer decision.

source_checklist.label: Blind review attested
source_checklist.next_action: Set reviewer_attestation only after choices are completed before opening the answer key.

source_checklist.label: Raw content attested
source_checklist.next_action: Attest that reviewer decisions exclude raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, messages, and private user content.

source_checklist.label: Raw content blocked
source_checklist.next_action: Adjudication evidence should store prompt hashes and reviewer metadata, not raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, or messages.

source_checklist.label: Human evidence ready
source_checklist.next_action: Complete all reviewer decisions with metadata and rationale, plus blind-review attestation and integrity fingerprints.

items.next_action: Assign a real reviewer identity before claiming human adjudication.

roles.label: Supporting evidence
roles.description: Supporting-evidence rows help reviewers audit the packet but do not all need to be copied into artifact_refs.

items.label: Native Permission Enforcement

prechecks.label: Permission policy
prechecks.next_action: Keep approved high-permission capabilities explicit.

prechecks.label: Runtime probes
prechecks.next_action: Refresh runtime permission probes after packaging changes.

prechecks.label: Native guard
prechecks.next_action: Attach a real target-client or external installer runtime guard; metadata fallback is not enough.

source_checklist.label: Native enforcement
source_checklist.next_action: Collect real target-client or external runtime guard proof.

source_checklist.label: Probe failures
source_checklist.next_action: Runtime permission probes must stay clean.

source_checklist.label: Installer support
source_checklist.next_action: Installer enforcement is supporting evidence, not native proof.

items.next_action: Attach a real target-client or external installer runtime guard; metadata fallback is not enough.

roles.label: Submission refs
roles.description: Rows marked submission-ref are the aggregate paths expected in artifact_refs.

roles.label: Supporting evidence
roles.description: Supporting-evidence rows help reviewers audit the packet but do not all need to be copied into artifact_refs.

runbook: Implement or connect a real target client or external installer runtime guard that blocks undeclared network, file_write, or subprocess capabilities.
Update the generated target adapter only when the guard is actually enforced by that target.
python3 scripts/yao.py package . --platform openai --platform claude --platform generic --platform vscode --output-dir dist --zip
Copy evidence/world_class/templates/native-permission-enforcement.intake.json to evidence/world_class/submissions/native-permission-enforcement.json and fill only real evidence fields.

repair_checklist.next_action: Attach a real target-client or external installer runtime guard; metadata fallback is not enough.
repair_checklist.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

repair_checklist.next_action: Collect real target-client or external runtime guard proof.
repair_checklist.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py runtime-permissions . --package-dir dist && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

rows.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py runtime-permissions . --package-dir dist && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

rows.next_action: Run provider-backed output-exec with real credentials.
rows.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py output-exec --provider-runner openai --timeout-seconds 60 && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

rows.next_action: Provider execution should return non-estimated token usage.
rows.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py output-exec --provider-runner openai --timeout-seconds 60 && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

roles.label: Submission refs
roles.description: Rows marked submission-ref are the aggregate paths expected in artifact_refs.

roles.label: Supporting evidence
roles.description: Supporting-evidence rows help reviewers audit the packet but do not all need to be copied into artifact_refs.
